_about: CSS style sheets keyed by name. Referenced from gui.json via helpCssLight / helpCssDark.
_note: Keys starting with '_' are documentation and safely ignored by Gson.
_format: Each entry is an array of CSS rule strings joined by ThemeManager.getCss().
_comment_helpLight: Light-theme stylesheet for the help page WebView [List<String>]
_comment_helpDark: Dark-theme stylesheet for the help page WebView [List<String>]
helpDark: h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { color: #ffffff; }
